title: Greek Gyro
description: A classic Greek street food featuring tender pork, smoky flavor, and a variety of fresh toppings.

ingredients.name: gyro seasoning
ingredients.notes: available at most Greek markets or online

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together gyro seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Add the sliced pork to the bowl and toss to coat.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the pork to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until browned and cooked through.
Warm the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for a few minutes.
Assemble the gyros by spreading tzatziki sauce on the pita, followed by a few slices of pork, some red onion, tomato, and red bell pepper.
Top with feta cheese, if using, and a sprinkle of parsley.
